themes.topic: Meta's planned 14GW AI compute infrastructure expansion by 2027
themes.summary: Meta reportedly aims to double its AI infrastructure to 14GW of compute deployed by 2027, including a new $10 billion datacenter in Canada, potentially necessitating an equity raise.
